---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    theme: minty
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    smooth-scroll: true
    title-block-banner: false
sidebar: false
---

```{=html}
<style>

/* ===== NAVBAR ===== */

.navbar{
  background-color:#0b3d2e !important;
  border-bottom:1px solid #14532d;
}

.navbar-brand,
.navbar a{
  color:white !important;
  font-weight:600;
  letter-spacing:0.3px;
}

.navbar a:hover{
  color:#bbf7d0 !important;
}

/* ===== PAGE ===== */

body{
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom right, #eefbf3, #dff5e7);
  font-family:'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
  color:#1f2937;
}

main.content{
  padding-top:12px !important;
}

/* Hide code completely */
.cell-code,
.sourceCode{
  display:none !important;
}

/* ===== HERO ===== */

.hero{
  background: linear-gradient(135deg,#14532d,#22c55e);
  color:white;
  padding:65px 40px;
  border-radius:22px;
  text-align:center;
  margin-bottom:22px;
  box-shadow:0px 8px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
}

.hero h1{
  font-size:3.3rem;
  font-weight:800;
  margin-bottom:10px;
}

.hero p{
  font-size:1.08rem;
  max-width:700px;
  margin:auto;
  opacity:0.96;
  line-height:1.7;
}

/* ===== CARDS ===== */

.card-box{
  background:white;
  border-radius:18px;
  padding:24px;
  box-shadow:0px 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
  border:1px solid #dcfce7;
  height:100%;
  transition:0.25s ease;
}

.card-box:hover{
  transform:translateY(-4px);
  box-shadow:0px 8px 20px rgba(34,197,94,0.14);
}

.card-box h3{
  color:#166534;
  margin-bottom:12px;
  font-size:1.2rem;
}

/* ===== STATS ===== */

.stats{
  background: linear-gradient(135deg,#15803d,#22c55e);
  color:white;
  border-radius:18px;
  padding:24px;
  text-align:center;
  box-shadow:0px 4px 18px rgba(34,197,94,0.18);
}

.stats h2{
  font-size:2.1rem;
  font-weight:800;
  margin-bottom:4px;
}

/* ===== FOOTER ===== */

.footer{
  text-align:center;
  margin-top:30px;
  padding:12px;
  color:#166534;
  font-size:0.95rem;
}

</style>

::: {.hero}

Yusuf Bora Çavdar

Data Analytics • Machine Learning • Visualization

I explore data, build analytical projects, and create visual stories using modern data science tools.

This website showcases my projects, research, and analytics work developed with R and Quarto.

:::

::: {.columns}

:::: {.column width="50%"}

::: {.card-box}

About Me
Data Analytics
Statistical Modeling
Data Visualization
Reproducible Research
Machine Learning

I enjoy transforming raw data into meaningful insights and visual narratives.

:::

::::

:::: {.column width="50%"}

::: {.card-box}

Current Focus
Higher Education Analytics
Interactive Visualizations
Dashboard Systems
Statistical Exploration
Research Projects

Currently improving analytical storytelling and presentation skills.

:::

::::

:::

<br>

::: {.columns}

:::: {.column width="33%"}

::: {.stats}

10+

Projects

:::

::::

:::: {.column width="33%"}

::: {.stats}

R

Main Tool

:::

::::

:::: {.column width="33%"}

::: {.stats}

Data

Driven Thinking

:::

::::

:::

<br>

::: {.columns}

:::: {.column width="33%"}

::: {.card-box}

📊 Visualization

Creating clean and impactful visual analytics with R and ggplot2.

:::

::::

:::: {.column width="33%"}

::: {.card-box}

📈 Statistical Analysis

Exploring patterns, trends, and relationships hidden inside data.

:::

::::

:::: {.column width="33%"}

::: {.card-box}

🤖 Machine Learning

Building predictive and analytical models for real-world datasets.

:::

::::

:::

<div class="footer">

Made with 💚 using R and Quarto

</div> ```
